session.user: Run make fast-ci from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. Do NOT fix anything, just report.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci from repository root

session.assistant:
All checks passed successfully. Here's the summary:
**Lint**: All checks passed **Format Check**: 1666 files already formatted **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style **Markdown Check**: OK (no issues reported) **Exec Reference Check**: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date **Type Checking (ty)**: All checks passed
**Unit Tests Summary**: - erk: 5899 passed in 12.97s - erk-dev: 136 passed in 4.71s - erk-statusline: 115 passed in 0.82s - erk-mcp: 24 passed (included in verification)
**CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Verification**: - Standard: PASSED - All files properly paired - 19 CLAUDE.md files checked with 0 violations
The entire fast-ci suite completed successfully with no failures.
